allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1500; $r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3777/healthz -UseBasicParsing; "healthz: $\($r1.StatusCode\) $\($r1.Content\)"; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3777/api/config -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop } catch { "config unauth: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" }; $login = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3777/api/login -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json' -Body '{"password":"test123"}' -UseBasicParsing -SessionVariable sess; "login: $\($login.StatusCode\) $\($login.Content\)"; $cfg = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3777/api/config -UseBasicParsing -WebSession $sess; "config auth: $\($cfg.StatusCode\) $\($cfg.Content\)")

PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3777/api/login -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json' -Body '{"password":"wrong"}' -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop } catch { "wrong pw: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" }; $login = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3777/api/login -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json' -Body '{"password":"test123"}' -UseBasicParsing -SessionVariable sess; $chat = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3777/api/chat -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json' -Body '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"hi"}],"mode":"socratic","model":"gpt-4o-mini"}' -UseBasicParsing -WebSession $sess; "chat: $\($chat.StatusCode\) | content-type: $\($chat.Headers['Content-Type']\) | body: $\($chat.Content\)")

PowerShell($login = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3777/api/login -Method POST -ContentType 'application/json' -Body '{"password":"test123"}' -UseBasicParsing -SessionVariable sess; $cookie = $login.Headers['Set-Cookie'].Split\(';'\)[0]; curl.exe -s -N --max-time 20 -X POST http://localhost:3777/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Cookie: $cookie" -d '{\\"messages\\":[{\\"role\\":\\"user\\",\\"content\\":\\"hi\\"}],\\"mode\\":\\"socratic\\",\\"model\\":\\"gpt-4o-mini\\"}')
